creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
This is a quick update for mail/imap-uw after Mark Crispin (supposely) solved
the LIST "AAAAA...." vulnerability in imapd. If this is proven to be correct
then the warning message should be at least modified if not disabled (Kris ?).

Fix: I've attached a compressed patchfile to upgrade the current port.

    I'd like to thank Kris Kennaway for his concern about this ports' security
    and Forrest Aldirch for sending me the notice.

 Adrian Penisoara
 Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
How-To-Repeat: 
 Build the port.
